phase_name: Room, Swipe, Match, and SSE Persistence Conversion

completed_tasks.name: Capture Phase 39 implementation decisions in CONTEXT.md and DISCUSSION-LOG.md
Record Phase 39 context session in STATE.md

remaining_tasks.name: Create Phase 39 research and plan artifacts from the locked context
Run Phase 39 planning verification and resolve any checker findings
Execute Phase 39 after planning is approved

decisions.decision: Persisted room, swipe, and match records keep using the current browser/session identity as the participant key
decisions.rationale: The user explicitly rejected introducing a new participant-id layer during the persistence conversion

decisions.decision: Swipe write, cursor advance, match detection, and last_match update stay one atomic mutation with BEGIN IMMEDIATE-equivalent serialization
decisions.rationale: The user wanted strict behavioral parity for race protection and visible match semantics

decisions.decision: SSE stays snapshot-driven, post-commit, app-local, and replay-free
decisions.rationale: The user kept Phase 39 scoped to persistence conversion rather than eventing redesign

decisions.decision: Repositories split by room/swipe/match concern and services split into room lifecycle plus swipe/match orchestration
decisions.rationale: The user wanted a real service/repository seam without another monolithic room-state component

next_action: Run $gsd-plan-phase 39 to create research and plan artifacts from .planning/phases/39-room-swipe-match-and-sse-persistence-conversion/39-CONTEXT.md.
context_notes: Phase 39 is paused immediately after discuss-phase completion. The phase directory contains 39-CONTEXT.md and 39-DISCUSSION-LOG.md only; no research, PLAN.md, or execution artifacts exist yet. STATE.md correctly says Phase 39 is ready to plan. The worktree is clean. Planning should start by reading the new context, then ROADMAP/REQUIREMENTS, then the current room route and SSE parity tests. An unrelated hygiene scan found placeholder/TBD text in older artifacts under phases 24, 26, 27, 33, 35, and 38; that is not blocking Phase 39.
